etymology.description: phonetic: 此(此) (cǐ, 'this') + semantic: 角(角) (jiǎo, 'horn') = component representing a horn-like structure for sound + shape -> beak
etymology.interpretation: The character 觜(觜) combines the sound element 此(此) (cǐ, 'this') with the semantic element 角(角) (jiǎo, 'horn'), indicating a structure that resembles a horn in shape and sound, like a beak.
